what: Release readiness for FSC-2417: ready=False, 3 blocker(s) — verdict=BLOCKED
why: FSC-2417 is blocked from release: the Development phase has failed, test coverage is 0% (critically below the FCA-mandated threshold), and UAT sign-off cannot proceed until defects are resolved. No phases have passed; the story must return to development to fix the failing build and establish comprehensive test coverage before UAT coordination can resume. Release is prohibited until Development passes, coverage meets or exceeds the regulatory minimum (75–85% depending on FCA classification), and all defects are closed.
